rulings.Case Title: IN RE: PANORAMA CONDOMINIUM OWNERS' ASSOCIATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioners Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Verified Petition To Reduce Required Voting Percentage To Amend Amended And Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions, And Restrictions For Cominium Panorama (With Sale Lease Option)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 10, 2022 line 1. PETITIONER'S AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR HEARING ON VERIFIED PETITION TO REDUCE REQUIRED VOTING PERCENTAGE TO AMEND AMENDED AND RESTATED DECLARATIONS OF COVENANTS, CONDITIONS, AND RESTRICTIONS is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare an order and submit it for execution at the hearing. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT PATANE VS. GALE LEA GRINSELL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT To The Complaint Of Albert Patane, Or, In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, November 10, 2022 Line 5, DEFENDANTS GALE LEA GRINSELL, FOUNDERS REALTY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT To The Complaint Of Albert Patane, Or, In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Motion for Summary Judgment/Adjudication is framed by the allegations in the Complaint. Defendant failed to shift its burden and show that there are not triable issues of fact/Defendant is entitled to a judgment as a matter of law as to the entirety of the Complaint or any individual cause of action. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: UNITED BUSINESS BANK, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. KINNEY HOTEL, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, November 10, 2022 Line 9, UNITED BUSINESS BANKS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE 1. APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IN AID OF RECEIVER; AND 2. TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER is OFF CALENDAR. No valid proof of service on file. POS on file purports to have accomplished service on a corporate defendant by serving someone not identified as an agent for process of service or corporate officer. No explanation or authority provided for service on "other: LLC" in paragraph 6 of the form POS, which requires a CCP section to be listed: " under the following Code of Civil Procedure section ." =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. LUDMILA KRYUCHKOVA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, November 10, 2022 Line 11, DEFENDANT LUDMILA KRYUCHKOVA DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile allegations in paragraph 9 of the Amended Complaint with exhibits attached to the complaint: Lease for the Premises of which possession is sought (2130 Stockton, unit 304) and the Parking Agreement. Lease for the Premises indicates monthly rent of $2,950 for unit 304 and no parking. Parking Agreement appears to be a separate and distinct contract for differently defined Premises (Space P106) possession of which is not sought in the Amended Complaint. If Plaintiff alleges that these two contracts constitute one agreement for the Premises at 2130 Stockton, unit 304 and rent due for P106 is basis for recovery of possession of unit 304, Plaintiff must so allege. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: MARY H. MITHUN VS. LATEEFAH BAXTER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, November 10, 2022 Line 12, DEFENDANT LATEEFAH BAXTER, CAMERON BAXTER DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a landlord tenant relationship: e.g. (1) to allege that Plaintiff, defined in the Complaint solely as a co-trustee of February 3, 2020 Trust, entered into an agreement with the Defendants in that capacity in 2011; or (2) that Plaintiff as co-trustee, is the successor in interest to the original party to the lease, etc. The Court does not reach other arguments on the demurrer as the remaining issues may be resolved by the amendment. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
